title: OSF UI View Manifest
description: Schema for views/<id>/manifest.json. Bridge protocol 0.4 (unstable). Mirrors src/runtime/ViewManifest.cpp.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint; ignored by the runtime.

id.description: Unique view id. Matches the folder name and config.json's "view". Required.

description.description: One-line blurb shown in catalogs (views.data / the Mods surface). Defaults to empty.

mod.description: Owning settings mod id (the RegisterSettingsSchema / settings/<id>.json id). The Mods surface groups this view's launcher/toggle onto that mod's page. Empty/absent = standalone: the view gets its own entry under its title.

entry.description: Relative path to the entry HTML, inside the view folder. Absolute paths and any '..' component are rejected.

width.description: Initial view width. The d3d12 compositor resizes the view to the screen aspect at runtime; author responsive CSS.

height.description: Initial view height (resized at runtime; capped at 1440).

transparent.description: Render with an alpha channel so the game shows through unpainted areas.

zorder.description: Compositing layer when several views are hosted. Lower draws beneath, higher on top. Ties keep load order.

interactive.description: Whether this view may receive input and become the active (focused) view. Set false for passive overlays like a HUD.

kind.description: Surface kind. menu = modal overlay (may capture input, single-menu stack); hud = passive overlay over gameplay (never captures input, pauses, or focuses). Unknown values fall back to menu.

capturesInput.description: Menu-only: while this is the top open menu, freeze the game and route input into the page. Forced false for HUDs.

pausesGame.description: Menu-only: pause the simulation while this is the top open menu. Forced false for HUDs.

openOnStart.description: Menu: open at load. HUD: show at load.

order.description: Within-band z order hint for the menu/HUD framework (HUD band 0..999). Distinct from zorder, the raw compositing sort key.

hub.description: List this view in catalogs (views.data / the Mods surface). false = hidden utility view; it still loads and works, it just isn't advertised. (Field name predates the Mods surface.)

permissions.description: Capability grants. Everything defaults to deny.

nativeBridge.description: Inject window.osfui. If false, no bridge is created and the page runs purely client-side.

filesystem.description: Reserved; no implementation enforces this yet.

network.description: Reserved; forced off with a warning if set true.
